title: PresenceIntent
description: The semantic intent the brain sends to the Presence Director. Never contains animation-specific detail. Renderers interpret this into visible motion.

state.description: High-level state Nero should be in.

emotion.description: Emotional coloring on top of the state.

intensity.description: How strongly to express state + emotion. 0 = imperceptible, 1 = max the runtime supports.

voice_profile.description: Which voice profile is speaking (hint for runtime coordination).

metadata.description: Escape-hatch renderer-specific hints. Runtimes MUST tolerate unknown keys.
